  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the gameplay screen and configures keyboard events.

    • createMediaPlayer

      private javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer createMediaPlayer(String path)
      Helper method to create a MediaPlayer and pre-load the resource.

    • handleRestartGame

      void handleRestartGame()
      Restarts the game from the beginning.

    • startGame

      public void startGame()
      Starts a new game and resets score, timer, and level data.

    • nextWord

      public void nextWord()
      Generates and displays the next word for the player.

    • startTimer

      public void startTimer()
      Starts the timer for the current level.

    • validateWord

      public void validateWord()
      Validates the word entered by the player and updates the score and game state.

    • levelUp

      private void levelUp()
      Increases the current level and restarts the timer.

    • goToGameOver

      public void goToGameOver()
      Loads the Game Over screen and sends the final results.

    • playSound

      private void playSound(javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer player)
      Plays a sound effect using a pre-loaded MediaPlayer. Stops the player before playing to ensure the sound starts from the beginning.
      Parameters:
      player - the MediaPlayer object to play

    • playBackgroundMusic

      private void playBackgroundMusic(String soundFile)
      Plays background music in an infinite loop. Stops any previous background music before starting the new one.
      Parameters:
      soundFile - absolute path of the music file in the resources folder

    • onHandleCheck

      void onHandleCheck()
